summary: Comprehensive testing of FleetLock AI-Powered Parametric Income Insurance MVP completed. Backend APIs functional, frontend UI working well with proper authentication flows. Core features including admin/worker dashboards, insurance plans, and ML insights are operational.

ui_bugs.issue: Chart rendering warnings about width/height being -1
ui_bugs.details: Console warnings: 'The width(-1) and height(-1) of chart should be greater than 0' - charts still display but with warnings

passed_tests: Landing page loads with hero section and features
Admin dashboard displays stats, charts, and recent claims
Worker dashboard shows earnings chart, loyalty score, active plan
Insurance plans page displays all 3 tiers (Sahara/Kavach/Suraksha)
ML insights data displaying in admin dashboard
Claims history showing in worker dashboard

success_percentage.frontend: 85% (Core functionality working, minor chart rendering issues)
